commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional plugin-facing `api.resetSession(key, reason?)`, reuses gateway reset internals, updates SDK exports/docs/changelog/baselines, and adds focused reset-session contract tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Inspecting the latest PR diff against current main is enough: the helper is added under `capabilityHandlers`, and current main enables that block for `discovery` and `tool-discovery`.
commands.review_followup: A narrow PR-branch repair can move the helper behind a full-mode-only gate and add the missing discovery absence tests.
commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: joshuaswarren
commands.command: final follow-up: latest pushed head is 260c086af7. i also fixed the `check-lint` findings from the ci rerun (stale imports in `src/plugins/registry.ts` and an obsolete lint suppression in `src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts`). all prior feedback remains addressed on this head: reset broadcasts are preserved for `sessions.reset`, `api.resetsession(key, reason?)` is documented, the changelog entry is present, and the plugin sdk api baseline is regenerated and passing locally. final local validation before push: - `pnpm lint --threads=8` - `pnpm tsgo:core` - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` - `pnpm test -- src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-hooks.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts` - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1` on the touched files

commands.author: joshuaswarren
commands.command: quick follow-up: the latest pushed head is now 6f4d20af34 after fixing the ci type annotations from the rerun. all feedback remains addressed: - reset broadcasts are preserved for `sessions.reset` and the reset path now keeps a consistent config snapshot when reloading the entry under the store lock. - `api.resetsession(key, reason?)` is documented in the plugin runtime docs. - the changelog includes the new plugin sdk reset-session api entry. - the plugin sdk api baseline was regenerated and checked. focused local validation on the final head: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` - `pnpm test -- src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-hooks.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts` - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - direct `tsgo` core + extensions checks using the installed binaries, because this worktree has broken `.bin` symlink resolution for `pnpm exec` after reinstall. - direct `oxfmt --check --threads=1` for the touched gateway files and sdk hash. the earlier duplicate `plugindiagnostic` parser failure and the later reset-session type errors are fixed in the pr branch.
commands.freeform_prompt: quick follow-up: the latest pushed head is now 6f4d20af34 after fixing the CI type annotations from the rerun. All feedback remains addressed: - Reset broadcasts are preserved for `sessions.reset` and the reset path now keeps a consistent config snapshot when reloading the entry under the store lock. - `api.resetSession(key, reason?)` is documented in the plugin runtime docs. - The changelog includes the new plugin SDK reset-session API entry. - The plugin SDK API baseline was regenerated and checked. Focused local validation on the final head: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` - `pnpm test -- src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-hooks.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts` - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - Direct `tsgo` core + extensions checks using the installed binaries, because this worktree has broken `.bin` symlink resolution for `pnpm exec` after reinstall. - Direct `oxfmt --check --threads=1` for the touched gateway files and SDK hash. The earlier duplicate `PluginDiagnostic` parser failure and the later reset-session type errors are fixed in the PR branch.

commands.author: joshuaswarren
commands.command: all feedback from your recent review has been addressed in the latest pushed head `b9ec52b62a`. - preserved reset notification semantics: successful gateway/plugin reset paths now emit through the shared reset flow, and the stale direct handler-only broadcast removal is covered by the replacement `sessions.changed` subscriber test in `src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts`. - documented the new public sdk helper: `api.resetsession(key, reason?)` is now documented in `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md`, including full-mode availability and structured success/failure results. - added the required user-facing changelog entry under `2026.5.2` for the plugin sdk addition. - fixed the ci parser failure from the rebase by removing the duplicate `plugindiagnostic` type import in `src/plugins/registry.ts`. focused local checks run after the final rebase: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` passed. - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` passed after regenerating the sdk api hash. - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugins/types.ts src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-reset-service.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/core.ts docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md changelog.md` passed. the earlier github ci failure was real and related to the duplicate import; that is now fixed and pushed. i also checked the remaining local `test:bundled` diagnostic-listener failure against current `origin/main`, and it reproduces there with the same assertion, so it is not introduced by this pr.
commands.freeform_prompt: all feedback from your recent review has been addressed in the latest pushed head `b9ec52b62a`. - Preserved reset notification semantics: successful gateway/plugin reset paths now emit through the shared reset flow, and the stale direct handler-only broadcast removal is covered by the replacement `sessions.changed` subscriber test in `src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts`. - Documented the new public SDK helper: `api.resetSession(key, reason?)` is now documented in `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md`, including full-mode availability and structured success/failure results. - Added the required user-facing changelog entry under `2026.5.2` for the plugin SDK addition. - Fixed the CI parser failure from the rebase by removing the duplicate `PluginDiagnostic` type import in `src/plugins/registry.ts`. Focused local checks run after the final rebase: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` passed. - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` passed after regenerating the SDK API hash. - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugins/types.ts src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-reset-service.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/core.ts docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md CHANGELOG.md` passed. The earlier GitHub CI failure was real and related to the duplicate import; that is now fixed and pushed. I also checked the remaining local `test:bundled` diagnostic-listener failure against current `origin/main`, and it reproduces there with the same assertion, so it is not introduced by this PR.
